title: District Court Rayagada – Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer – 17 Posts

basic_details.job_title: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer Grade-III. Candidates with Graduate, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Court Rayagada official website rayagada.odisha.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Typing/Shorthand speed

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Rayagada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
